name: Your Name
title: DevOps / Linux / Backend Engineer
bio: I specialize in automating resilient backend architectures, designing secure infrastructure pipelines, and building low-latency, system-oriented microservices. Obsessed with high availability, Linux systems, and automated declarative configuration.

terminalFS.about.md:
### About Me
Experienced Infrastructure & DevOps Engineer, Linux Admin, and Backend Dev.
Specialized in securing cluster environments, setting up fast Caddy proxies, containerizing microservices pipelines, and writing optimized backend models in Go/Python.
Core Principle: Clear documentation, low latency, 100% automated pipelines.
terminalFS.cv.txt:
SYSTEM RESUME DATA ACQUISITION RECORD
======================================
- Systems/Linux: Debian, Ubuntu Server, Proxmox Virtual Environments.
- Containerization/DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, Ansible, GitHub Actions, Caddy Proxy.
- Backend Systems: Go (Golang), Python (FastAPI), Redis Cluster, PostgreSQL.
- ICT Operations: DNS Zone controls, TLS/SSL automation, Portless Tunnels, Network Protection Layers.

Run "cat about.md" or dispatch a POST message via the contact form to connect.
terminalFS.tunnel_manifest.yml:
tunnel: your-portfolio-tunnel
credentials-file: /root/.cloudflared/cert.json
ingress:
  - hostname: demo.yourname.dev
    service: http://localhost:8080
  - hostname: monitor.yourname.dev
    service: http://localhost:9090
  - service: http_status:404
